name: Gyros
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Cucumber, seeded and pureed, strain
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except sauce ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Blend until well combined.
3. Combine the sauce ingredients in another bowl.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Serve the meat mixture inside whole pitas with chopped tomatoes and red onion on top.
6. Drizzle the prepared sauce over the meat inside the pitas.
